basic_details.job_title: BITS Pilani Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Birla Institute of Technology and Science Pilani (BITS Pilani)
basic_details.short_information: Birla Institute of Technology and Science Pilani (BITS Pilani) Junior Research Fellow Notification 2026 has been released on the official website of BITS Pilani. Has been announced through the BITS Pilani Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: Post Graduate degree in Mathematics with first class or at least 6.5 CGPA, Minimum 55% marks in B.Sc.
qualification.details: Post-graduate degree in Mathematics with first class (or at least 6.5 CGPA) and a minimum of 55% marks in B.Sc. Excellent academic background with sound knowledge in Linear Algebra, Real & Complex Analysis and Functional Analysis. Preference to NET/GATE qualified candidates.

salary_details.details: Rs. 37000 + HRA as applicable Per Month

selection_process: Shortlisting based on application Online Interview
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for BITS Pilani Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 31-05-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the BITS Pilani JRF recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email is 31st May 2026. Ensure your application reaches before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Junior Research Fellow post?
faq.answer: You need a Post-graduate degree in Mathematics with first class or at least 6.5 CGPA, and a minimum of 55% marks in B.Sc. Sound knowledge in specific mathematical areas is also essential.

faq.question: Q3. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Junior Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a monthly salary of Rs. 37000 plus HRA as applicable.

faq.question: Q5. How will candidates be selected for the JRF post?
faq.answer: The selection process involves shortlisting candidates based on their applications, followed by an online interview.

faq.question: Q6. What is the mode of application for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process is strictly via email. You need to send your complete application to the designated email address.

faq.question: Q7. Does BITS Pilani offer age relaxation for reserved categories?
faq.answer: Please refer to the official notification for details regarding age relaxation for reserved categories, as it is not explicitly mentioned in the provided data.

faq.question: Q8. Are NET/GATE qualified candidates preferred for this role?
faq.answer: Yes, candidates who are NET/GATE qualified will be given preference for the Junior Research Fellow position.

faq.question: Q9. What specific areas of mathematics knowledge are required?
faq.answer: Candidates are expected to have sound knowledge in Linear Algebra, Real & Complex Analysis, and Functional Analysis.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification can be accessed through the "Important Links" section of this article, under the "Official Notification PDF" heading.
